problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: If Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region is applied to alone, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
